title: Meow Wolf Denver Unveils Local Artists
author: unknown
date_note: Pre-opening announcement; Convergence Station opened September 17, 2021
body:
Westword article announcing the 110+ Colorado artists contributing to Meow Wolf Denver (Convergence Station). Among the featured artists: the Aquakota nightclub installation, "conceptualized by the late Colin Richard Ferguson Ward and completed in his memory by Peniel Apantenco and Kim Shively." The article covers four floors of 79 separate art projects. Other noted works include those by Kalyn Heffernan, Gregg Ziemba, Cal Duran, David Ocelotl Garcia, and Molina Speaks.

This is the announcement piece (pre-opening) as distinct from the February 2022 Aquakota tribute coverage and the Westword obit.

## Sources
- [Denver Westword](https://www.westword.com/arts-culture/meow-wolf-denver-unveils-local-artists-11972153/)
